command_results.command:
set -e

echo "=== smoke: probe base train weighted ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/probe_retention_family_adapter_dataset.py \
  --adapter-json "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_training_consumer_adapter_train_weighted_dataset.json" \
  --checkpoint "checkpoints/15x15_current_best_margin_g2m13_m15_3pair_b.pt" \
  --output-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/train_before.csv" \
  --output-md "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/train_before.md" \
  --channels 64 \
  --blocks 4

echo "=== smoke: probe base eval ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/probe_retention_family_adapter_dataset.py \
  --adapter-json "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_training_consumer_adapter_eval_dataset.json" \
  --checkpoint "checkpoints/15x15_current_best_margin_g2m13_m15_3pair_b.pt" \
  --output-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/eval_before.csv" \
  --output-md "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/eval_before.md" \
  --channels 64 \
  --blocks 4

echo "=== smoke: tiny weighted training ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/train_teacher_divergence_policy_mixed_ce_anchor_probe.py \
  --dataset "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_training_consumer_adapter_train_weighted_dataset.json" \
  --base-checkpoint "checkpoints/15x15_current_best_margin_g2m13_m15_3pair_b.pt" \
  --out-checkpoint "checkpoints/probes/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke_candidate.pt" \
  --eval-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/train_script_eval.csv" \
  --report "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/train_script_report.md" \
  --epochs 1 \
  --lr 1e-5 \
  --kl-weight 1.0 \
  --anchor-kl-splits train_candidate \
  --train-scope policy_head \
  --channels 64 \
  --blocks 4 \
  --device cpu \
  --no-strict-splits

echo "=== smoke: probe candidate train weighted ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/probe_retention_family_adapter_dataset.py \
  --adapter-json "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_training_consumer_adapter_train_weighted_dataset.json" \
  --checkpoint "checkpoints/probes/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke_candidate.pt" \
  --output-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/train_after.csv" \
  --output-md "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/train_after.md" \
  --channels 64 \
  --blocks 4

echo "=== smoke: probe candidate eval ==="
PYTHONPATH=src python scripts/probe_retention_family_adapter_dataset.py \
  --adapter-json "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_training_consumer_adapter_eval_dataset.json" \
  --checkpoint "checkpoints/probes/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke_candidate.pt" \
  --output-csv "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/eval_after.csv" \
  --output-md "analysis/integration_eval/retention_family_threshold_train_gate_smoke/eval_after.md" \
  --channels 64 \
  --blocks 4
command_results.label: train

critical_eval_rows.materialized_reason: stable top1 gain gate, but not valid as the only sibling-family heldout check

critical_train_rows.materialized_reason: repeated heldout blocker; regression signal; sibling target conflict family; mixed signal family
repeated heldout blocker; regression signal; sibling target conflict family; mixed signal family
